==Event Information==
In the Supreme Arena, you can challenge opponents with higher ranks. Upon victory, you can exchange ranks, steadily climbing the leaderboard to earn rewards through continuous challenges. Additionally, the defense map changes weekly, allowing you to adjust hero formations to adapt and climb the ranks faster.

==Rules==
===Basics===
# In the Supreme Arena, you can spend Glory Badges to challenge others of the same district. When your three free Glory Badges are used, you may spend Diamonds in order to obtain up to 12 more.
# You can challenge opponents with higher ranks. Upon victory, you will exchange ranks.
# Supreme Arena uses a best-of-three format, with victory being achieved by winning two rounds.
# The default settlement time is 24:00 UTC, but you can change it to anytime between 12:00 UTC to 24:00 UTC and it will take effect the next day.
# The defensive map changes every week. The off season occurs on Mondays and Tuesdays, during which no challenges can be issued and no rewards will be distributed, though you can still set up your formation in advance.

===Level Restrictions===
* Season Levels are adjusted according to the baseline level (applied to both offensive and defensive formations).
* Season Levels exceeding (###) are set to (###) (baseline level.
* For Season Levels between (### + 1) and (### + 50), 20% is added to the baseline level.
* For Season Levels beyond (### + 51), only a minimal amount is added to the baseline level. (Note: This minimal amount does not scale linearly). Unlocked higher-level skills remain unaffected.
* The baseline Season Level of the Supreme Arena will gradually increase weekly. Hero Equipment Levels are adjusted to match Hero Levels.

===Calculation Time Rules===
# You can set your daily reward calculation time to either {{b|12:00 UTC}} or {{b|24:00 UTC}}. This can be changed at any time, but will only take effect {{b|the next day}}.
# Reward calculation will happen within a 10-minute window of your selected time. If you selected {{b|12:00 UTC}}, your rewards are calculated between {{b|11:50 UTC and 12:00 UTC}}. If you selected {{b|24:00 UTC}}, your rewards are calculated between {{b|23:50 UTC and 24:00 UTC}}.

===Additional Restrictions===
* This Battle Mode unlocks after reaching Season AFK Stage 130.
* During the last 30 minutes before your set calculation time, you are only allowed to challenge the same opponent after 15 minutes have passed since the last challenge.

==Ranks and Rewards==
Both Daily and Weekly Rewards are available for players based on their numerical rank in the district ranging from 1 to below 8000. When the new season begins, there are Challenger bot players that populate the ranks initially on defense but do not attack and swap ranks with active human players. You earn a set amount of gems as a 1st-time reward dependent on the new personal best in ranking you achieve when defeating a swapping ranks with another player.

:Additional Notes:
* 1-time diamond rewards are given whenever increasing your current rank, and the diamond amount ranges from 2x to 10x of your jump from your previous highest recorded rank to your new highest recorded rank.
* The Season XP Hourglass grants the corresponding Resonance leveling resource exclusive to 1 of the 3 Phases made available during the Phase in which the Season XP Hourglass is obtained. I.e. Season Manuals for Phase 1, Season Essence for Phase 2, and Season Twilight for Phase 3.

===Supreme Points Rewards===
After reaching higher ranks (Top 1-50), you start obtaining Supreme Points as part of your daily rewards. They can be used to obtain avatar frames!

| Hidden Tile 
| Enemies will not be able to view the information of the heroes the player places on Hidden Tiles.
|-
| Infinite Front - Soulless Rest
| Every {{b|10}}s, Thoran drains HP from 2 targets, one from each team. He prioritizes summons (starting with the one with the highest current HP), then heroes (starting with the rearmost one). Thoran may switch to new targets if needed, continuing to drain HP until the total drained HP Ratio from each team reaches {{b|300%}}.
|-
| Infinite Front - Field Forge
| Hugin forges armor for any hero who moves {{b|4}} tiles within {{b|0.5}}s, granting them a shield equal to {{b|80%}} of their max HP. This effect can trigger once every {{b|8}}s per hero. While the shield is active, they are {{e|unaffected}} and gain an additional shield value equal to {{b|20%}} of their max HP whenever they assist or defeat an enemy.
|-
| Infinite Front - Rallying Grounds
| When a battle starts, the {{b|3}} {{e|frontmost}} heroes and their associated units fight as vanguards, while the remaining units are put on standby. After {{b|20}}s or once all vanguards are defeated, these standby units enter the battlefield. Upon entering, each standby unit gains a shield equal to {{b|60%}} of their max HP and recovers {{b|100}} Energy per second for {{b|10}}s.
|-

==Store==  
Once Supreme Arena is unlocked, the [[Season Store]] becomes available at the [[Emporium]]. Inventory refreshes at the beginning of every month, and new seasonal heroes from a previous season are added periodically (typically at the end of every new hero banner) as well as Supreme Points Rewards avatar frames.
